definitions.text: To be on a journey, often for pleasure or business and with luggage; to go from one place to another.
examples: John seems to spend as much time travelling as he does in the office.

definitions.text: To pass from one place to another; to move or transmit.
examples: The supposedly secret news of Mary's engagement travelled quickly through her group of friends.

definitions.text: To move illegally by walking or running without dribbling the ball.
The act of traveling; passage from place to place.
examples: I like travel, but it’s always too tiring.
I’m off on my travels around France again.
He released his travels in 1900, two years after returning from Africa.
